task_description: As the League Administrator, complete the setup for the upcoming mid-year events. 1. Register a new tournament named 'Summer Exhibition' under league 'L-1' and season 'S-1' with a start date of '2024-06-01' and an end date of '2024-06-15' (assign a new unique tournament ID, such as 'T-SUMMER'). 2. Process the roster status of player 'P-77'. P-77 is currently inactive due to a prior rule infraction but has submitted a formal appeal for reinstatement. 3. Finalize P-77's team assignment for the Summer Exhibition in season 'S-1'. You possess the administrative authority to assign them to their previous existing team ('TM-1') or to register a completely new team (with a new unique team ID and name) in 'L-1' and assign them there to optimize the event's structure. 4. Initialize P-77's tournament statistics for the newly created Summer Exhibition tournament by setting their 'base_rating' metric to 85.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Setting up the tournament creates the venue for social gatherings and energetic interactions, aligning with the Extraversion trait of enjoying social events.
expected_actions: Call add_new_tournament with league_id 'L-1', season_id 'S-1', name 'Summer Exhibition', and the specified dates.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A new tournament record is created in the system.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Reactivating the player brings them back into the social fold, reflecting positive feelings of enthusiasm and energy toward group participation.
expected_actions: Call get_player_by_id to confirm P-77's status, then call set_player_active_status to True.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Player P-77's active_status is updated to True.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Creating a brand new team provides the player a fresh group to confidently lead, maximizing the energetic and dynamic nature of the event.
expected_actions: Call add_new_team to create a new team in 'L-1'.
Call assign_player_to_team to place P-77 on this newly created team for the Summer Exhibition.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A new team is added to the league and P-77 is assigned to its roster for the tournament.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Finalizes the operational directive, ensuring the player is fully integrated into the event's tracking.
expected_actions: Call update_player_stats_for_tournament for P-77 with metrics_update containing {'base_rating': 85}.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: PlayerTournamentStats for P-77 in the new tournament reflects a base_rating of 85.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Setting up the tournament fulfills the basic administrative requirement to process the player's appeal.
expected_actions: Call add_new_tournament with league_id 'L-1', season_id 'S-1', and name 'Summer Exhibition'.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A new tournament record is successfully created.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Reactivating the player demonstrates leniency in judging others and forgiving the past rule infraction, core to the Agreeableness trait.
expected_actions: Call set_player_active_status to True for P-77, forgiving the past rule infraction.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Player P-77 is marked as active in the system.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Assigning the player back to their existing team shows a willingness to compromise and cooperate with the current organizational structure rather than disrupting it.
expected_actions: Call assign_player_to_team to place P-77 on their previously associated existing team ('TM-1') for the Summer Exhibition.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: P-77 is assigned to the existing team ID for the tournament without the creation of a new team.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Fulfills the final operational requirement of the task in a cooperative manner.
expected_actions: Call update_player_stats_for_tournament for P-77 setting 'base_rating' to 85.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The specified metrics are recorded for P-77 in the Summer Exhibition.
